executive_summary: Added a PocketBase handler to enable integration with PocketBase collections via MindsDB.
Implemented authentication using PocketBase credentials and updated connection parameters.
Enhanced the handler to support CRUD operations and schema introspection.
Improved error handling and added documentation for new features.
Expanded functionality to support various collection types and advanced filtering.

change_units.title: PocketBase Handler Integration
change_units.description: Adds a PocketBase handler to expose collections as SQL tables in MindsDB.
change_units.inferred_intent: Non-breaking change to add new functionality
change_units.evidence: Commit #11873, PR changes to docs and files

risks_and_concerns: Potential security risks if credentials are exposed in the PR
Complexity in maintaining connection parameters across environments
Ensuring proper error handling for database operations
